heroSubtitle: A smart visual fashion discovery platform that turns inspiration into action.
introText1: FITFINDER is a web application that allows users to discover clothing items using images instead of traditional text-based searches.
introText2: The platform uses intelligent image segmentation using (SAM), accurate embedding for images and text prompts by (OpenCLIP), and visual similarity search using (FAISS Index).
step1: Upload an image containing a person.
step2: Click Segment to highlight clothing pieces.
step3: Select the clothing item to segment.
step4: (Optionally) add positive/negative points and re-segment to refine the segmentation.
step5: The selected clothing item is cropped.
step6: (Optionally) add a text prompt to refine the search.
step7: Click search to retrieve similar products.
feature6: Recomendations system for similar products and most searched for
personalizationText: FITFINDER adapts to user preferences through responsive design and theming support.
academicText1: FITFINDER is a graduation project developed by
academicText3: . The project demonstrates the application of modern web development, software engineering principles, and intelligent image processing in a real-world scenario.
